title: centaurea sennenii
intro: Centaurea sennenii, a species of thistle native to the Iberian Peninsula, is a flowering plant characterized by its tall stems and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Centaurea sennenii include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Centaurea sennenii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
